textByHashes.20d86254fdfc283437ce58067ccca36e984ffe73: There are no more White Trees left in the world - they have all been chopped down, and their beauty has forever left this world.
textByHashes.8af4ba48e651607a518681e37f32d4cc2cc33011: Even if there were a White Tree somewhere I would not tell you, for as soon as it would grow then it would be slaughtered in its prime. Man's hunger for fire is greater than his admiration of beauty.
textByHashes.28d2697fbd770b738de306abbd890500ac4b0efc: Am I so transparent? You have seen through me; there is something I would rather not tell you.
textByHashes.8a42fc4bb70344938cc05156794111547d52dcd0: Leave me in peace then, if you are so unable to understand my grief.
textByHashes.4f3ccee867a45e0bdd997f40bebc3676e12e72d8: It is not hard to keep this secret - to give it away would cause me great sorrow.
textByHashes.9b1976438f3a00dbfb797890c262631327c17fd7: Very well - I feel deep trust in you for some reason. It is the White Tree, last survivor of a race of Trees that have disappeared from our landscape. Once they covered the land; now there is only one.
textByHashes.b0fed112d796d38c85799347703f3da57be4ce37: Man desired the wood of the White Tree, because of its wood of pure white. Need I tell you more?
textByHashes.81cc1f72c5ed84841fca9d3678256a9a0df9c875: She stands atop Ice Mountain, alone and sorrowful; and, I fear, that she is dying.
textByHashes.ad40e7a6fe1a59d2e438730e900b9d9630b3ce75: Yes, but she only has life enough to produce one shoot. Cut this shoot, and she will die, last of her kind gone forever. If you failed to grow this shoot, there would be no more White Trees.
textByHashes.23dc6db4579027611785c7b685e9c51d234aea93: No, I am afraid I cannot do that. She is the last White Tree, and I am the last to care about her. I will not let her pass away alone and unloved.
textByHashes.504ef3b9ca107128b21dc94be09e41b99d9d3be2: I know, but I try not to think about that. You speak truly - she does not have much time left.
textByHashes.932063b65daa613fd0166a82e2d0934ea974f8d1: Do so with my blessing. I wish you good fortune, . Go now, and save the beauty of the White Tree.
textByHashes.d292417e94758db43a94300a36eefdb094089fc4: I do not believe what I am hearing, after everything you said to me before!
textByHashes.1159b7258fce4f9b2deed28ac142971334e2fc73: Maybe - just maybe - there might be another shoot somewhere on the Tree that you can take as a cutting. Go and havea look, before she dies without offspring!
